title: Density Heatmap — KDE glow
blurb: A 2D Gaussian-KDE density field over a scattered point cloud, rasterized to a cyan→white glow colormap and drawn as a single textured quad. Shown precomputed; live per-pixel GPU density is the frontier.

colorbar.label: Density (KDE) · PRECOMPUTED — live-GPU KDE is the wall
